purpose: Offline deterministic Stage-2 Deep Research benchmark matrix that checks domain-general facet coverage, source quality, and claim support without selecting any single scientific fixture by default.

cases.title: Market and GTM evidence synthesis
cases.prompt: Evaluate whether a new product category has credible segment demand, willingness to pay, buyer personas, competitive alternatives, and channel constraints.

expected_claims.text: Market/GTM research should connect segment sizing, willingness-to-pay evidence, buyer personas, and channel constraints before recommending a launch motion.

cases.title: Policy and public-data evaluation
cases.prompt: Assess a public intervention using official statistics, evaluation evidence, equity impacts, implementation constraints, and counterfactual risks.

expected_claims.text: Policy/public-data research should cite official statistics, intervention outcomes, equity impact, and implementation constraints.

cases.title: Finance and diligence analysis
cases.prompt: Review an investment or acquisition thesis using filings, audited financials, unit economics, risk factors, and downside scenarios.

expected_claims.text: Finance diligence should connect filings, audited financials, unit economics, risk factors, and downside scenarios.

cases.title: Legal and regulatory research
cases.prompt: Analyze a regulated activity using statutes, agency guidance, precedent, jurisdiction boundaries, compliance duties, and enforcement uncertainty.

expected_claims.text: Legal/regulatory research should cite statutes, agency guidance, precedent, jurisdiction boundaries, compliance duties, and enforcement uncertainty.

cases.title: Technical and product evaluation
cases.prompt: Evaluate a technical product decision using architecture constraints, benchmark data, integration risk, user workflows, and operational reliability.

expected_claims.text: Technical/product research should connect architecture constraints, benchmark data, integration risk, user workflows, and reliability tradeoffs.

cases.title: Academic and literature review
cases.prompt: Review a scholarly question using primary papers, systematic reviews, methods comparability, effect sizes, limitations, and open debates.

expected_claims.text: Academic/literature research should cite primary papers, systematic reviews, methods comparability, effect sizes, limitations, and open debates.

cases.title: Local business operations research
cases.prompt: Assess a local operating plan using foot traffic, permits, supplier constraints, staffing, local competitors, and seasonal demand.

expected_claims.text: Local/business-ops research should connect foot traffic, permits, supplier constraints, staffing, local competitors, and seasonal demand.

cases.title: Scientific hybrid translational research
cases.prompt: Evaluate a science-to-product thesis using primary research, protocols, validation metrics, deployment constraints, adjacent alternatives, and commercialization evidence.

expected_claims.text: Scientific hybrid research should connect primary research, protocols, validation metrics, deployment constraints, adjacent alternatives, and commercialization evidence.
